The following guest post is by Josh Mendelsohn, Managing Director at Hattery and cofounder of Engine Advocacy.
At Hattery, the investment firm I co-founded a little over a year ago, we invest financially, and also provide the resources of our team: skills, time, and dedication.
At Hattery and Engine, we celebrate the power of the startup community and work to educate government on how important we are to the U.S. economy to ensure that future legislation does get it right.
